title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
description: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.
content:
Russian President Vladimir Putin has said he thinks Russia's conflict with Ukraine is coming to an end, addressing reporters after a scaled-back military parade in Moscow marking the Soviet victory in World War Two.

title: Is Starmer's leadership under serious threat?
description: Downing Street is trying to ignore the challenge from a former minister, but it has raised eyebrows around Westminster.
content:
The prime minister is facing the first explicit threat of a leadership challenge from one of his MPs, but how much of a threat does it pose to Sir Keir Starmer?

title: Daniel Dubois stops Fabio Wardley in bloody epic to win WBO heavyweight title
description: Despite being knocked down in the opening seconds and again later, Daniel Dubois rallied to beat Fabio Wardley in an extraordinary bout
content: Daniel Dubois completed his latest resurgence with brutal efficiency when he became the WBO world heavyweight champion after stopping Fabio Wardley early in the 11th round of a dramatic and blood-soaked contest. Howard Foster, whose pale blue shirt h... [5695 chars]

title: Antisemitism 'a problem for all to fix', organisers of rally say
description: In recent months, there have been a string of attacks at synagogues and other Jewish sites.
content:
Antisemitism is "a problem for all of us to fix", religious leaders from across the country have said in an open letter published in support of the UK's Jewish community.

title: Bafta TV Awards 2026: Adolescence, Amandaland and Celebrity Traitors stars ready for ceremony
description: Big names and rising stars will be honoured on the biggest night in the British TV calendar.
content:
The stars of hit shows like Adolescence, Amandaland, The Celebrity Traitors and Last One Laughing will gather later to find out who has won a Bafta Television Award, on one of the biggest nights in the British TV calendar.
